name: capability-evolver
description: A fully local machine learning engine that makes your OpenClaw agent smart over time — without ever calling home, revealing your machine ID, or exposing any security holes. Tracks fix outcomes with a feedback loop, clusters errors with semantic embeddings, and learns which strategies work using a k-NN predictor. Every evolution is auditable. No telemetry, no fingerprinting, no network calls.
author: Joe Che (https://mastermindshq.business)
